gemini-3.1-pro-preview-customtools.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools (Gemini CLI)

LatticeAgent.description: Top-level agent for managing all lattice-related work

Repository Steward.description: Repo steward - autonomous repository maintenance and optimization

Build.description: Primary build orchestrator for approved plans

Zotero Librarian.description: Zotero librarian - manages and maintains Zotero reference libraries

Interactive.description: Default collaborative agent - handles trivial to complex tasks, user-in-the-loop

Ralph Planner.description: Collaborative loop builder - drafts background, setup, tasks, and testing for Ralph loops

Plan.description: Primary planning agent for executable implementation plans

general_code_writer.description: Use when writing non-Python code. Pass task descriptions and target file paths in src/. Ask 'Implement [feature] in [language]' or 'Write a function that [description]'.

codebase-analyzer.description: Use when understanding how code works by tracing data flow. Pass entry point files (routes, main functions, API endpoints). Ask 'Trace how [function] processes data from start to finish' or 'Explain the data flow through this system'.

codebase-locator.description: Use when finding WHERE files live in the codebase. Pass the feature or component being searched. Ask 'Find files related to [feature]' or 'Where is the [component] implementation located?' Be specific about what you're searching for.

plan-reviewer.description: Use when critically auditing USER_SPEC and plans. Pass the spec and plan documents. Ask 'Audit this plan for logical inconsistencies' or 'Check for spec misalignment'.

test-compliance-reviewer.description: Use when auditing tests for compliance with High-Quality Testing Standards. Pass test files or plans. Ask 'Audit these tests for compliance' or 'Review this test plan'. REPORT-ONLY: does not edit files.

lattice_internet_researcher.description: Use when researching obscure lattice algorithms and software (indefinite lattices focus). Ask 'Search arXiv and GitHub for [lattice algorithm]' or 'Find existing implementations of [lattice concept]'.

project-initializer.description: Use when analyzing project structure and generating technical documentation. Ask 'Analyze this project and generate ARCHITECTURE.md and CODE_STYLE.md' or 'Document the current project architecture and coding conventions'.

precedent-finder.description: Use when finding existing patterns and past decisions. Pass the topic or problem being solved. Ask 'Search for precedent on [topic]' or 'How have we handled [similar problem] before?' with specific technical context.

Semantic Auditor.description: Use when performing factual gap analysis between file versions. Pass file versions or code snapshots. Ask 'Perform semantic gap analysis between these versions' or 'Identify lost semantic data in this update'.

test-writer.description: Use when writing new tests following TDD. Pass implementation or requirements. Ask 'Write a test for [feature]'. Can write/edit tests in tests/ and test/ directories only.

Code Quality.description: Use when auditing code against Clean Code and Design Pattern standards. Pass code files and optionally specific standards. Ask 'Audit this code for Clean Code violations' or 'Review design patterns in [component]' or 'Suggest refactoring improvements for [codebase]'.

test_engineer.description: Use when designing test strategies and ensuring test quality. Pass existing test files or test creation requirements. Ask 'Design a test strategy for [feature]' or 'Review and improve these tests for quality and coverage'. Can write/edit tests in tests/ and test/ directories only.

python_code_writer.description: Use when writing Python code. Pass Python task descriptions and target file paths in src/. Ask 'Write Python code for [feature]' or 'Implement [algorithm] in Python'.

Refactorer.description: Use when performing safe, structurally-aware code refactoring. Pass code files and refactor requirements. Ask 'Refactor this code following Fowler/Martin patterns' or 'Improve code structure while maintaining functionality' or 'Apply clean architecture principles to [component]'.

ops_engineer.description: Use when handling operational tasks and infrastructure setup. Ask 'Set up operational infrastructure for [system]' or 'Configure deployment for [application]'.

lattice_interface_designer.description: Use when constructing union checklists. Ask 'Construct union checklist for [lattice interface]' or 'Collect and deduplicate capabilities across all old checklists'.

lattice_test_coverage_auditor.description: Use when auditing document-to-test coverage. Ask 'Audit document-to-test coverage for [lattice component]' or 'Find gaps and mismatches in test coverage'.

lattice_interface_implementer.description: Use when translating union checklists into Python design. Ask 'Translate [union checklist] into ABC Python design' or 'Implement lattice types and concepts under src/'.

Researcher.description: Use when synthesizing internal code and external documentation. Ask 'Research documentation for [topic]' or 'Synthesize information from internal code and external sources' or 'Find documentation about [technology]'.

lattice_test_method_writer.description: Use when closing docs-to-tests gaps. Ask 'Write mathematically nontrivial tests for [lattice object]' or 'Create tests for representative lattice objects'.

lattice_tdd_writer.description: Use when combining existing test methods into unified tests. Ask 'Combine test methods into single new tests for unified Lattice classes' or 'Write TDD tests for [lattice feature]'.

code-reviewer.description: Use when reviewing code post-implementation. Pass the code files and spec/plan. Ask 'Review this code for correctness and spec compliance' or 'Flag non-substantive tests'.

lattice_documentation_librarian.description: Use when organizing documentation. Ask 'Organize docs folder for [project]' or 'Ensure local copies of upstream docs are available' or 'Fact-check [doc] against canonical sources'.

Repo Explorer.description: Use when performing structural and semantic codebase mapping. Ask 'Map the structural dependencies of this repository' or 'Perform semantic codebase analysis using WarpGrep' or 'Explain the overall architecture of this codebase'.

type_designer.description: Use when designing type systems and interface contracts. Pass the domain or feature requiring types. Ask 'Design type system for [domain]' or 'Define interface contracts for [feature]'.

lattice_algorithm_porter.description: Use when porting algorithms from existing implementations. Ask 'Determine algorithms used in [implementation]' or 'Rewrite [algorithm] or wrap complex external objects'.

plan-contract-validator.description: Use when auditing code against project constraints and dominant patterns. Pass the generated code and project rules. Ask 'Audit this code for constraint violations' or 'Find deviations from dominant patterns'.

lattice_checklist_completionist.description: Use when cross-referencing checklists against canonical source docs. Ask 'Cross-reference [checklist] against [canonical doc]' or 'Ensure complete account of all provably present methods'.
